name: S-4 audit report includes an overall coverage percentage line per the gap analyzer contract
command:
printf -- '- id: a
  fetch_frequency: daily
- id: b
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > cat.yaml && mkdir -p tree/a && printf 'source:
  id: a
rules:
  - {id: r, provenance: [{source: a}]}
' > tree/a/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit r.md --catalog cat.yaml --tree tree && grep -q 'Overall coverage: 50%' r.md && echo coverage 1>&2
